issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling for API failures or missing data scenarios.
The skill lacks concrete code snippets or step-by-step procedures for implementation.
The skill relies on Claude's vision API, limiting compatibility to that vendor.

scenarios.name: extract-floor-plan-rooms
scenarios.rationale: Response A offers a workable script that could generate the required JSON if extended, whereas Response B simply refuses to provide any data.

scenarios.name: extract-ibc-compliance-data
scenarios.rationale: Response A partially meets the rubric by providing some fields, while Response B fails to produce the required JSON structure.
